_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for nv-generate-mr-brain — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk declares.

vars.MODEL_CONFIG: <path to a model-config override JSON, or 'default' for upstream defaults>
vars.MODALITY: <MR-brain modality name, e.g. mri_t1 / mri_t2 / mri_flair>
vars.NV_GENERATE_ROOT: <path to the cloned NVIDIA-Medtech/NV-Generate-CTMR upstream repo>
